value.value: Pure-Python source-of-truth for string helper built-ins.

value.repr: ch == " " or ch == "\t" or ch == "\n" or ch == "\r"

test.repr: ch == "\r" and i + 1 < n and s[i + 1] == "\n"
i + m <= n and py_find_window(s, oldv, i, i + m) == i

values.repr: py_find_window(s, oldv, i, i + m) == i

test.repr: replaced < count and i + m <= n and py_find_window(s, oldv, i, i + m) == i

values.repr: py_find_window(s, oldv, i, i + m) == i
